subject: feat(frontend-complete): PWA prompt, accessibility, README, backend spec audit
body:
Complete all remaining frontend work:
- PWA install prompt: captures beforeinstallprompt, dismissible banner
- README rewrite: full feature list, setup guide, documentation table
- Accessibility audit (31 issues, all high/medium fixed):
  - ARIA roles: Toast, LoadingSpinner, ErrorBoundary, OfflineIndicator
  - Modal: aria-labelledby, focus ring on close
  - NotificationBell: Escape close, keyboard nav, dynamic aria-label
  - Breadcrumb nav label, role switcher label, decorative SVG hidden
  - NotFoundPage heading hierarchy, NudgeExpiryConfig describedby
- Backend spec rewrite against actual code:
  - Content length limits table, module_version triggers
  - Frontend vs backend notification types clarified
  - Business logic section, cron specs, Resend config, bcrypt cost
  - Removed is_system from templates, split_approved from types
- Missing signature logs: handshake_signed, sequence_approved
- Module amendment notification when signed module edited

Tags: frontend-complete, pwa, accessibility, backend-spec, documentation
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mvp-frontend
Semver: minor
